toyota camry.name: Toyota Camry (2018-2023)
known_issues: Oil consumption >1 qt/5k mi (2.5L pre-2021 build)
Sunroof drain clogs leading to interior leaks
Catalytic converter theft risk — high target vehicle

honda accord.name: Honda Accord (2018-2022)
known_issues: 1.5T oil dilution in cold climates — monitor closely
CVT judder at low speeds on some 2018-2019 units
Bluetooth connectivity drops after software updates

ford f-150.name: Ford F-150 (2018-2023)
known_issues: EcoBoost carbon buildup on intake valves (walnut blast at 60k)
Panoramic roof wind noise on 2019-2021
Tailgate latch sticking in cold weather

chevrolet silverado.name: Chevrolet Silverado 1500 (2019-2023)
known_issues: AFM/DFM lifter failures on 5.3L — watch for tick at startup
Oil consumption with active fuel management enabled
Trailer brake controller sensitivity complaints

toyota tacoma.name: Toyota Tacoma (2016-2023)
known_issues: Frame rust concerns on older units in salt-belt states
Infotainment system slow response on early 2016-2018
Rear leaf spring squeaks common — lube or replace bushings

honda civic.name: Honda Civic (2016-2021)
known_issues: 1.5T oil dilution — especially cold starts in northern climates
AC compressor failure on 2016-2018 1.5T
Adhesive-mounted trim panels separating in heat

ram 1500.name: Ram 1500 (2019-2023)
known_issues: HEMI tick on startup — common MDS lifter wear
Uconnect system freezes requiring battery reset
EcoDiesel 3.0L NOx emission recall — verify completion

toyota corolla.name: Toyota Corolla (2020-2023)
known_issues: Rearview camera delay on cold starts
Road noise from rear wheel wells — install additional deadening
Hybrid battery warranty — 10 yr / 150k in ZEV states

honda cr-v.name: Honda CR-V (2017-2022)
known_issues: 1.5T oil dilution — worst on 2017-2018 in cold climates
Infotainment screen delamination on 2017-2019
CVT shudder at highway merge speeds

ford escape.name: Ford Escape (2020-2023)
known_issues: 1.5L 3-cyl coolant intrusion into cylinder — check TSB 21-2316
PHEV range degradation in cold weather
Reverse camera pixelation on 2020-2021

toyota camry 2002.name: Toyota Camry (2002-2011)
known_issues: 2AZ-FE severe oil consumption — class action settlement, check every fill-up
VVT-i oil hose failure on 2AZ-FE causing sudden oil loss
1MZ-FE/2GR-FE rear main seal leak and PS hose leak at high mileage

toyota camry 2012.name: Toyota Camry (2012-2017)
known_issues: 2AR-FE oil consumption — monitor closely, same family as 2AZ-FE
V6 2GR-FE valve cover gasket seepage at high mileage
Radio/infotainment freezes on 2012-2014 — software update available

toyota rav4.name: Toyota RAV4 (2013-2018)
known_issues: 2AR-FE oil consumption — check every oil change
AC musty odor from evaporator in humid climates
Rear differential clutch shudder on AWD models

toyota rav4 2019.name: Toyota RAV4 (2019-2024)
known_issues: Hybrid battery warranty 10yr/150k in CARB states
AC blower motor noise at low fan speed
Panoramic moonroof rattle on rough roads

toyota prius.name: Toyota Prius (2010-2015)
known_issues: Inverter coolant pump failure — replace proactively at 80k
HV battery cell degradation — check 12V aux battery annually
Brake actuator assembly failure (soft pedal) — TSB exists

toyota prius 2016.name: Toyota Prius (2016-2022)
known_issues: HV battery pack degradation after 150k — monitor with Techstream
12V aux battery failure common after 5 years
Oil consumption in 2ZR-FXE at high mileage — check regularly

toyota highlander.name: Toyota Highlander (2014-2019)
known_issues: 2.7L 1AR-FE oil consumption noted by owners
3rd-row seat track binding over time
AC evaporator musty odor — use Toyota AC cleaner spray

toyota 4runner.name: Toyota 4Runner (2003-2023)
known_issues: Frame rust — inspect undercarriage annually in salt-belt states
Rear main seal and cam tower oil leaks at high mileage
Front lower ball joint wear — inspect at every tire rotation

toyota tundra.name: Toyota Tundra (2007-2021)
known_issues: Frame rust recall on 2000-2003 — verify repair on used units
Secondary air injection pump failure (P0418) — common at 80k
Cam tower front oil leak on high-mileage 5.7L

honda civic 2001.name: Honda Civic (2001-2015)
known_issues: D17A2 timing chain tensioner rattle on cold starts (2001-2005)
R18A1 oil consumption at high mileage — check level monthly
Rust around rear wheel arches in northern states

honda pilot.name: Honda Pilot (2009-2022)
known_issues: VCM cylinder deactivation causes vibration and premature engine mounts — consider VCMuzzler
Power steering hose leak at rack (2009-2015)
3rd-row seat folding mechanism binding

honda odyssey.name: Honda Odyssey (2011-2017)
known_issues: VCM issues causing vibration — engine mounts wear prematurely
AC condenser corrosion and leak on front bumper units
Power sliding door actuator failure

ford f-150 2009.name: Ford F-150 (2009-2017)
known_issues: 3.5T EcoBoost carbon buildup on intake valves — walnut blast at 60k
Spark plug blowout on 2-valve 5.4L (pre-2011) — torque to spec
Cam phaser rattle on 5.0L Coyote at startup (oil pressure related)

ford explorer.name: Ford Explorer (2011-2019)
known_issues: Exhaust fume intrusion into cabin — NHTSA recall; inspect rear lift gate seal
PTU (Power Transfer Unit) failure from neglected fluid changes
2.0T EcoBoost carbon buildup on intake valves

ford mustang.name: Ford Mustang GT (2005-2014)
known_issues: 4.6L 3V spark plug thread failure — use proper extraction kit, do not force
Rear axle seal leaks on 8.8" axle at high mileage
IRS axle halfshaft CV boot tears on 2011-2014 Coyote GT

chevrolet silverado 2007.name: Chevrolet Silverado 1500 (2007-2018)
known_issues: AFM lifter failure on 5.3L L83/LY5 — tick at startup, especially at 80k+
Oil consumption with active fuel management — add catch can
Throttle body carbon buildup causing idle surge (5.3L)

chevrolet equinox.name: Chevrolet Equinox (2010-2017)
known_issues: 2.4L LAF timing chain wear — rattle on cold starts, replace chain kit at first sign
2.4L oil and coolant consumption (2010-2012) — check TSBs
Rear hatch strut failure common after 5 years

chevrolet tahoe.name: Chevrolet Tahoe (2015-2020)
known_issues: AFM/DFM lifter failures — same issue as Silverado 5.3L
Oil consumption with cylinder deactivation enabled
Front brake squeal from factory pads — upgrade to ceramic

nissan altima.name: Nissan Altima (2007-2018)
known_issues: CVT transmission failure — most common issue, change fluid every 30k
QR25DE oil consumption at high mileage — check level every fill-up
Radiator cracking at ATF cooler fitting (2007-2012) — inspect before overheat

nissan rogue.name: Nissan Rogue (2014-2020)
known_issues: CVT whine and shudder — Nissan extended warranty on some years, check coverage
Timing chain stretch causing P0011/P0014 codes on QR25DE
Brake pad wear faster than expected — inspect every 15k

nissan frontier.name: Nissan Frontier (2005-2021)
known_issues: 4.0L VQ40DE timing chain guide failure — rattle/knock; replace guides at 100k+
Radiator cracking and coolant mixing with ATF (known 2005-2012)
Front lower control arm bushing wear causing pull and wander

jeep wrangler.name: Jeep Wrangler JK (2007-2018)
known_issues: Death wobble — worn track bar bushings, ball joints, or steering stabilizer
D30/D44 axle seal leaks common after off-road use
3.6L Pentastar cam phaser rattle on cold start — oil pressure related

jeep grand cherokee.name: Jeep Grand Cherokee (2011-2021)
known_issues: TIPM failure — causes intermittent starting/stalling/fan issues
Transfer case shudder and NVH under acceleration
3.6L Pentastar cam phaser rattle — maintain strict oil change intervals

subaru outback.name: Subaru Outback (2010-2019)
known_issues: FB25 oil consumption 2011-2014 — Subaru extended warranty to 100k, check eligibility
EZ36 valve cover gasket oil leaks at high mileage
AWD rear coupling wear — vibration at highway speeds if fluid neglected

hyundai elantra.name: Hyundai Elantra (2011-2022)
known_issues: Theta II 2.0L engine knock/rod bearing failure — check NHTSA recall by VIN
Oil consumption in 2011-2014 NU engines — class action settlement
Transmission mount wear causing vibration at idle (DCT models)

dodge charger.name: Dodge Charger / Challenger (2011-2023)
known_issues: HEMI tick on cold start — MDS lifter wear; check oil level and weight
TIPM electrical issues causing cooling fan failures and stalling
3.6L Pentastar cam phaser rattle — no extended cold idling

dodge challenger.name: Dodge Challenger (2008-2023)
known_issues: HEMI tick
Driveshaft carrier bearing failure

acura mdx.name: Acura MDX (2014-2020)
known_issues: 9-speed transmission hard shifting (2016+) — software update may help
Timing belt tensioner ticking noise on cold starts
VCM issues causing oil consumption and fouled spark plugs

acura tlx.name: Acura TLX (2015-2020)
known_issues: 9-speed ZF transmission (V6) jerky shifts — check for recalls/updates
2.4L direct injection carbon buildup on intake valves
Connecting rod bearing wear on some V6 models (NHTSA recall)

honda hr-v.name: Honda HR-V (2016-2022)
known_issues: CVT belt slip/failure — covered under extended warranty on some years
Start button failure causing no-start conditions
Window seals degrading causing wind noise

honda ridgeline.name: Honda Ridgeline (2017-2023)
known_issues: Water leak in rear cabin from roof seam or sliding window
6-speed transmission shudder (2017-2019) — requires fluid triple-flush
Emissions system problem warning (fuel injector replacement common)

alfa romeo giulia.name: Alfa Romeo Giulia (2017-2023)
known_issues: Electrical gremlins (infotainment, random dash lights) — battery voltage sensitivity
Radiator leaks on 2.0T models at end tanks
Relay failures causing no-start conditions (check passenger footwell panel)

alfa romeo stelvio.name: Alfa Romeo Stelvio (2018-2023)
known_issues: OEM battery weakness causing multiple spurious fault codes
Sunroof drains clogging leading to interior water ingress
Early models had infotainment freezing issues — requires software update

fiat 500.name: Fiat 500 (2012-2019)
known_issues: MultiAir brick failure from neglected oil changes or wrong viscosity
Wheel bearing failure at relatively low mileage
Ignition coil failure causing misfires (especially on Turbo/Abarth)

audi a4.name: Audi A4 (B8/B9 2009-2023)
known_issues: B8 (2009-2012) severe oil consumption — piston ring defect
Timing chain tensioner failure on B8 2.0T — catastrophic engine damage risk
Water pump/thermostat housing leaks (plastic housing warping)

audi q5.name: Audi Q5 (2009-2023)
known_issues: 2.0T timing chain tensioner and oil consumption issues (early models)
3.0T supercharger intercooler core leaks
Panoramic sunroof frame creaking and drain leaks

volkswagen jetta.name: Volkswagen Jetta (2011-2023)
known_issues: 1.4L TSI oil burning — check level every 1k miles
Clock spring failure causing airbag light and loss of steering controls
Ignition coil packs failure under load (misfire)

volkswagen tiguan.name: Volkswagen Tiguan (2009-2023)
known_issues: Gen 1 (2009-2017) timing chain tensioner failure
Water pump and thermostat housing leaks common around 60k miles
Carbon buildup on intake valves — requires manual cleaning (walnut blast)

bmw 3 series.name: BMW 3 Series (F30/G20 2012-2023)
bmw 3 series.oil: 0W-20 or 5W-30 Full Synthetic (BMW LL-01 / LL-14 FE+)
known_issues: N20 (2012-2015) timing chain guide failure — listen for whine
Oil filter housing gasket leaks (N55/B58)
Charge pipe failure on N55 and B58 under heavy boost (upgraded part recommended)

bmw x5.name: BMW X5 (F15/G05 2014-2023)
known_issues: N63 V8 severe oil consumption and valve stem seal failure
Air suspension rear bag leaks causing vehicle to sag when parked
Water pump failure on N55 engines around 80k miles

mini cooper.name: MINI Cooper (F56 2014-2023)
known_issues: Upper engine mount failure on B38/B48 — look for leaking black fluid
Evap purge valve ticking noise or failure
Clutch premature wear on manual transmission models

buick enclave.name: Buick Enclave (2008-2023)
known_issues: 3.6L timing chain stretch (especially 2008-2012) if oil changes neglected
Transmission wave plate failure (6T75) on early models
Water pump leaks and power steering rack seal leaks

buick encore.name: Buick Encore (2013-2022)
known_issues: PCV valve failure built into the valve cover — requires entire cover replacement
Turbocharger wastegate cracking or underboost codes
Coolant leaks from water outlet housing and coolant return pipe

cadillac escalade.name: Cadillac Escalade (2015-2023)
known_issues: Magnetic ride control shock failure — expensive to replace, check for leaks
8-speed transmission shudder (2015-2017) — fluid flush/mobil 1 update needed
AFM/DFM lifter collapse causing misfires and engine tick

cadillac cts.name: Cadillac CTS (2008-2019)
known_issues: 3.6L timing chain stretch if oil changes ignored
CUE infotainment screen cracking/delamination (frequent replacement)
AWD transfer case front driveshaft failure

gmc sierra 1500.name: GMC Sierra 1500 (2014-2023)
known_issues: Lifter failure (AFM/DFM) causing tick and misfires
Transmission torque converter shudder (8-speed automatic)
Vacuum pump failure reducing braking assist

gmc acadia.name: GMC Acadia (2007-2023)
known_issues: Shift to Park warning message — microswitch failure in shifter assembly
3.6L timing chain stretch (2007-2012 models primarily)
Water pump leak and steering gear noise

chevrolet traverse.name: Chevrolet Traverse (2009-2023)
known_issues: Timing chain stretch on older 3.6L engines
Evap purge solenoid failure causing rough idle after fill-up
Shift to Park issue on 2018+ models

chevrolet malibu.name: Chevrolet Malibu (2016-2023)
known_issues: Shift to Park message — requires shifter assembly replacement or microswitch fix
1.5L piston failure (LSPI) — ensure Dexos1 Gen2/Gen3 oil is used
Vacuum pump leaking oil

chrysler 300.name: Chrysler 300 (2011-2023)
known_issues: Uconnect screen delamination (bubbling screen) on 2017+ 8.4-inch displays
3.6L cam phaser/rocker arm failure (ticking noise)
HEMI lifter failure on 5.7L

chrysler pacifica.name: Chrysler Pacifica (2017-2023)
known_issues: PHEV hybrid battery coolant heater failure (causes CEL and no electric mode)
Dual-screen rear entertainment system glitches
Auto start/stop system dual-battery failure causing electrical issues

dodge durango.name: Dodge Durango (2011-2023)
known_issues: Water pump failure on 3.6L or 5.7L leading to overheat
Racetrack tail light assembly led failure (water intrusion)
TIPM issues causing fuel pump relay failure (crank no start)

dodge grand caravan.name: Dodge Grand Caravan (2008-2020)
known_issues: Premature brake wear (caliper seizing and rotor warping)
3.6L cylinder head failure (P0302/P0304/P0306 misfire) on 2011-2013 models
HVAC blend door actuator failure clicking noise behind dash

jeep cherokee.name: Jeep Cherokee (KL 2014-2023)
known_issues: 2.4L Tigershark severe oil consumption causing stalling
9-speed transmission hard shifting / failing to find gears (software updates required)

ram promaster.name: Ram ProMaster (2014-2023)

Swollen lug nuts (two-piece design) — replace with solid aftermarket lug nuts

Hardtop (MIC) roof delamination and noise issues
